screenshots.title: Tech Mates Racing Overlay Setup
screenshots.textSample: Tech Mates Racing Overlay Setup | WixUI_Bmp_Dialog | Welcome to the Tech Mates Racing Overlay Setup Wizard | The Setup Wizard allows you to change the way Tech Mates Racing Overlay features are installed on your computer or to remove it from your computer. Click Next to continue or Cancel to exit the Setup Wizard. | &Back | &Next | Cancel

elements.text: Welcome to the Tech Mates Racing Overlay Setup Wizard

The Setup Wizard allows you to change the way Tech Mates Racing Overlay features are installed on your computer or to remove it from your computer. Click Next to continue or Cancel to exit the Setup Wizard.

screenshots.label: Installer page 2
screenshots.title: Tech Mates Racing Overlay Setup
screenshots.textSample: Tech Mates Racing Overlay Setup | WixUI_Bmp_Banner | Change, repair, or remove installation | Select the operation you wish to perform. | &Change | Tech Mates Racing Overlay has no independently selectable features. | Re&pair | Repairs errors in the most recent installation by fixing missing and corrupt files, shortcuts, and registry entries. | &Remove | Removes Tech Mates Racing Overlay from your computer. | &Back | &Next | Cancel

elements.text: Select the operation you wish to perform.
Tech Mates Racing Overlay has no independently selectable features.
Repairs errors in the most recent installation by fixing missing and corrupt files, shortcuts, and registry entries.
Removes Tech Mates Racing Overlay from your computer.
